title: OpenAI Bio Bug Bounty
friendlyTitle: OpenAI is paying more to find biology safety problems
summary: OpenAI expanded its bio safety bounty into an ongoing private program focused on universal jailbreaks for biorisk safeguards, starting with GPT-5.6. The company raised the reward for a qualifying universal jailbreak from $25,000 to $50,000.
friendlySummary: OpenAI will pay selected researchers up to $50,000 for finding serious ways to bypass its biology safety protections.
whyItMatters: Frontier model launches increasingly depend on external safety testing. A higher bounty for biosafety bypasses gives specialist researchers a clearer path to report serious failures before they affect real-world deployments.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This helps test powerful AI systems before people misuse them in risky scientific areas.
